name: Lakes Medi-Van

name: Friendly Harbor Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Private (Property) and Private Passenger (Business); passenger transport (adult day health / non-emergency medical transport)
fmcsa_address: 191 W LOWRY LANE, LEXINGTON, KY 40503 (FMCSA-of-record HQ); historical / operating MA address: 107 Welby Rd, New Bedford, MA 02745-1135
inc_date: unknown (MA Corporations Division portal not directly verified; CitySquares listing references entity #1423682)
entity_status: active (continues as a registered MA entity operating Active Day of New Bedford-Capeway and per ongoing FMCSA filings)
registry_source: MA Corporations Division Business Entity Search (corp.sec.state.ma.us) not directly accessed; CitySquares external listing references MA entity #1423682; FMCSA SAFER snapshot is the principal source
notes: Legal entity 'FRIENDLY HARBOR SERVICES INC' (USDOT 1739188) was acquired by / consolidated under Active Day, a national adult day health platform owned by Audax Private Equity. The FMCSA carrier record now lists HQ at Active Day's Lexington, KY corporate office and uses the DBA 'ACTIVE DAY KENTUCKY TRANSPORTATION'; power units/drivers (398/521) represent the consolidated fleet across many Active Day centers, NOT just the New Bedford operation. The original Friendly Harbor at 107 Welby Rd, New Bedford, MA continues to operate as 'Active Day of New Bedford' (acquired 09/01/2017). Phone for New Bedford location: (508) 998-8111. As a tuck-in target the actual local fleet/operation is much smaller than the consolidated FMCSA fleet figures suggest; treat with caution. Operating Authority status shows 'NOT AUTHORIZED' for for-hire interstate (does not affect private/intrastate ops).
